prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on O₂ (dioxygen, 2 atoms) at DFT, tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (exact four-centre integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF (UKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Geometry: user-supplied oxygen.xyz, used as-is (single-point, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run).

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV
HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV (degenerate pair, indices 14 & 15 — singly-occupied π* orbitals)
LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV (degenerate pair, indices 16 & 17)
Total energy: −150.38872 Hartree

Integrity: status=ok, trustworthy=true. All integrity checks passed.

CLI invocation:
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp \
  --charge 0 --mult 3
Output JSON: oxygen_frontier_dft.json
